no-categories-help: You don't have moderation permissions for any category. Please contact an administrator.
unsaved-changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
fields.name: Category Name
fields.name.desc: The display name of the category shown to users.
fields.handle.desc: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the category.
fields.handle-help: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the category.
fields.description.desc: A brief description of the category displayed on the category page.
fields.topicTemplate.desc: Content to pre-fill when creating a new topic in this category.
fields.topicTemplate-help: Content to pre-fill when creating a new topic in this category.
fields.parentCid.desc: Set a parent category to create a sub-category hierarchy.
fields.numRecentReplies.desc: Number of recent replies displayed on the category page.
fields.subCategoriesPerPage.desc: Number of sub-categories shown per page.
fields.minTags.desc: Minimum number of tags required per topic.
fields.maxTags.desc: Maximum number of tags allowed per topic.
fields.tagWhitelist-help: Comma-separated list of allowed tags (e.g., news,discussion,help).
fields.link.desc: An external URL to redirect to when the category is clicked.
fields.isSection.desc: When enabled, the category acts as a section with no topics.
fields.postQueue.desc: When enabled, new posts in this category require moderator approval.
fields.backgroundImage.desc: URL of the background image for the category header.
fields.bgColor.desc: Background color for the category header (hex format, e.g., #ffffff).
fields.color.desc: Text color for the category header (hex format, e.g., #000000).
fields.imageClass.desc: How the background image is sized (auto, cover, or contain).
fields.class.desc: Additional CSS class applied to the category element.
admin.title: Moderation Tools
admin.description: Configure which category fields moderators can manage from the frontend moderation tools page.
admin.fields-help: Select the fields that moderators can edit in the moderation tools page. Unselected fields will be hidden and cannot be modified by moderators.
admin.sidebar-help: Select the actions to display in the sidebar of the moderation tools page.
admin.policy-uniform: All configurations apply uniformly to all moderator roles (administrators, global moderators, moderators).
admin.policy-no-per-user: Per-user or per-category configuration is not supported to keep settings simple.
admin.policy-instant: Configuration changes take effect immediately without requiring a restart.
extension-field-template-load-error: Failed to load custom field template
widget.name: Moderation Tools Link
widget.description: Displays a link to the moderation tools page, visible only to users with moderation permissions.
widget.label: Moderation Tools
